title: Capital Stack Phase 1 -- Debt Sizing Downstream Data
description: Shape of the dataForDownstream object written to the master checkpoint by the debt sizing phase. Covers max loan by constraint, binding constraint identification, structure recommendation, and equity gap calculation.

loanSizingMatrix.description: Max loan amounts by lender type with binding constraints at each leverage point.

lenderTypes.description: Loan sizing for each evaluated lender type.

maxLoanAmount.description: Maximum loan amount achievable under all constraints.

ltv.description: Loan-to-value ratio at max loan amount (0-1).

dscr.description: Debt service coverage ratio at max loan amount.

debtYield.description: Debt yield (NOI / loan amount) at max loan amount (0-1).

bindingConstraint.description: The constraint that limits the max loan amount for this lender type.

rate.description: Estimated interest rate for this lender type.

rateType.description: Whether the estimated rate is fixed or floating.

spread.description: Spread over benchmark (bps) for floating rate estimates.

eligible.description: Whether this lender type is eligible for this deal based on asset type, size, and location.

notes.description: Additional context on sizing constraints or eligibility.

bestExecution.description: The lender type and amount that provides the best overall execution.

totalCapitalization.description: Total capitalization (purchase price or development cost) that the stack must equal.

bindingConstraint.description: The binding constraint for the recommended (best execution) lender type.

structureRecommendation.description: Recommended loan structure from the structure advisor.

amortization.description: Recommended amortization period in years. 0 for interest-only.

equityGap.description: Total capitalization minus max senior debt at recommended structure. Defines subordinate capital + equity requirement.

proceedsWaterfall.description: How the total capitalization is sourced across the stack.

subordinateCapitalPlaceholder.description: Placeholder amount for mezz/pref sizing in Phase 4.
